name: overseek-v2
description: Self-hosted WooCommerce command center with real-time analytics, unified inbox, AI marketing co-pilot, and inventory management

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy --config ./prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/overseek-core && npm run build -w packages/overseek-mcp && npm run build -w packages/overseek-cli
